label: sunday
quote: Garth here. Sunday afternoon. Sorry to miss you but I'll leave a brief message on your tape. Two-twenty P.M. Give me a call when you get in.
author: Carol Shields

label: monday
quote: Monday February 6th. '9.36am. Oh god Oh god. Maybe he's fallen in love in New York and stayed there'.
author: Helen Fielding

label: tuesday
quote: Message one. Tuesday 8.52am. Is anybody there? Hello?
author: Jonathan Safran Foer

label: wednesday
quote: At three on the Wednesday afternoon that bit of the painting was completed.
author: Wilkie Collins

label: thursday
quote: At 8 o'clock on Thursday morning Arthur didn't feel very good.
author: Douglas Adams

label: friday
quote: On Friday noon July the twentieth 1714 the finest bridge in all Peru broke and precipitated five travellers into the gulf below.
book: The Bridge of San Luis Rey
author: Thornton Wilder

label: saturday
quote: I opened the sunroof and turned up the CD player volume to combat fatigue and at 7.19am on Saturday the twenty-sixth of February the GPS told me I had arrived.
author: Graeme Simsion
